meta.title: MotoCommunity — Find Your Ride
meta.description: Connect with motorcycle riders, plan group rides, and build your "Riding Circle". Available on iOS.

hero.subtitle: Connect with motorcycle riders, plan group rides, and build your trusted community of fellow motorcyclists.

features.title: Everything for riders
features.find_rides_desc: Find rides near you on an interactive map and join the ones that suit you.
features.create_rides_desc: Create rides, set the route and details, invite fellow riders — and chat with participants in the ride chat.
features.circle_desc: Rate riders after every trip and build a trusted community of riders you can rely on.
features.languages_desc: Find rides where you can communicate in your native language or practice a new one — made for emigrants and travelers.

coming_features.title: Future Features
coming_features.sos_desc: Signal nearby riders when you need assistance on the road.
coming_features.clubs_desc: Join or create your own motorcycle club, regularly spending time among like-minded riders.
coming_features.events_desc: Discover or organize moto meetups, rides, parties, and moto gymkhana.
coming_features.sto_desc: Find trusted motorcycle service stations near you and leave a rating about the quality of service.
coming_features.store_desc: Find shops near you. Shops with motorcycle gear, equipment, parts, accessories and everything you need for you and your motorcycle.

cta.title: Ready to ride?
cta.subtitle: Join the community of motorcycle enthusiasts. Coming soon on iOS.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: MotoCommunity ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
privacy.section_collect_body: When you use MotoCommunity, we collect: your name and email address during registration; your approximate location (city/region) shown on your profile; profile photo uploaded by you; motorcycle ride details you create or join; ratings and reviews you submit; languages you speak (optional); authentication tokens for session management.
privacy.section_use_body: We use your data to: provide and operate the MotoCommunity app; show you nearby rides and riders; enable community features ("Riding Circle", ratings); send transactional emails (email verification, password reset); improve the product based on aggregated usage patterns.
privacy.section_third_body: MotoCommunity uses the following third-party services: Google OAuth and Apple Sign In — for authentication; Cloudflare R2 — for storing profile photos; Resend — for sending transactional emails; Railway — for server hosting; Neon (PostgreSQL) — for database storage.
privacy.section_retention_body: We store your data for as long as your account is active. You can delete your account at any time from Settings → Danger Zone → Delete Account. Upon deletion, all your personal data is permanently and immediately removed.
privacy.section_rights_body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. To request data export or deletion, contact us at the email below.
privacy.section_security_body: We use industry-standard security measures including HTTPS, hashed passwords, and secure token storage. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
privacy.section_contact_body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us via Telegram:
